name: getUserProfileAudios
description: Use this method to get a list of profile audios for a user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target user

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Sequential number of the first audio to be returned. By default, all audios are returned.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of audios to be retrieved. Values between 1-100 are accepted. Defaults to 100.
